source.description: Six-panel raster marker contact sheet generated for the June 30, 2026 cartoon asteroid lesson.
source.notes: Restored from the approved alternate contact sheet generated during the June 30 run after the owner chose it as the current lesson.

process_strategy: The sequence establishes the asteroid body, flame trail, craters, face, star puffs, and marker color before the final panel only reinforces existing ink, fill, and highlights.

final_elements.name: lumpy asteroid body
final_elements.description: A tilted lumpy rock shape streaking diagonally across the page.

final_elements.name: flame trail
final_elements.description: A jagged flame trail behind the asteroid body.

final_elements.name: rough lumpy rock contour
final_elements.description: The uneven outside edge that turns the guide into a recognizable asteroid rock.

final_elements.name: rough jagged flame contour
final_elements.description: The uneven flame-tail edge wrapped around the guide lines.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: A bold marker outline around the asteroid and flame trail.

final_elements.name: crater spots
final_elements.description: Three simple crater spots on the rock body.

final_elements.name: smiling face
final_elements.description: Two eyes and a small smiling mouth on the front of the asteroid.

final_elements.name: small star puffs
final_elements.description: Three small star shapes around the flying asteroid.

final_elements.name: gray-brown rock fill
final_elements.description: Marker fill inside the already drawn asteroid body and craters.

final_elements.name: orange-yellow flame fill
final_elements.description: Yellow and orange marker fill inside the already drawn flame trail.

final_elements.name: small white highlights
final_elements.description: Tiny highlights on existing craters, eyes, and flame shapes.

frames.visible_job: Places the tilted asteroid body guide and flame guide lines.
Turns the guide into a lumpy asteroid and rough flame trail.
Darkens only the already drawn lumpy rock edge and jagged flame edge into a thick black marker outline.
Adds crater spots, eyes, smile, and small star puffs.
Fills the established rock and flame shapes with marker color and leaves small highlight gaps.

final_step.visible_job: Retraces existing outlines, deepens marker fills, and clarifies highlights already placed on the craters, eyes, and flame shapes.

rejection_checks: No asteroid body, flame trail, crater, face, star puff, color area, or highlight should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink or color a shape that was not already visible earlier.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same asteroid pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
